MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, KHANDU SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 05 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-11-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

D. WICK, JUDGE; G.ESPINOCILLA, CLERK; M. BURNS, CSR. 2:25 P.M. CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. SETTLEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED AND READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF KHANDU PATEL AND AGAINST DEFT SANDY KIRKPATRICK FOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 161-6TH STREET #302 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ALL RENTS & DAMAGES THRU 2/15/94 WAIVED, EVICTION STAYED TILL 5:00 P.M. 2/15/94, ATTY FEES & COSTS WAIVED, AND SECURITY DEPOSIT, IF ANY, IS FORFEITED. IF DEFT VACATES BY 2/15/94, DEFT TO FILE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND PLTF SHALL NOT OPPOSE. PLTF MAY FILE MOTION TO VACATE IF DEFT UNABLE TO DO SO. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRKPATRICK, SANDY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 6TH STREET, #302, SF, CA 94103, STAYED UNTIL FEB-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
